designConstraints: Must use 8px spacing unit grid system with scale values [4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64]px
Background must use background-primary token (deep-navy #0F172A) consistent with dashboard, add-expense, and spending-insights pages
Form sections and setting groups must use surface-primary (navy-surface #1E293B) cards with elevation level 1 shadow (0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3))
Input fields must use surface-input (deep-navy #0F172A) background with border-default (slate-border #334155) and border-focus (gold-amber #F59E0B) on focus
Primary save/confirm CTA must use cta-primary (gold-amber #F59E0B) background with text-on-cta (deep-navy #0F172A) label, DM Sans display font
Border radius must follow token scale: small=6px for inputs and chips, medium=10px for cards, large=16px for section containers, pill=9999px for toggle/badge elements
Typography must use DM Sans (display) for headings and section labels, DM Mono (body) for data values and input text
Maximum 3 levels of visual hierarchy: page title → section heading → field label/value
Content max width of 1280px centered within viewport; single-column layout at 1440px desktop viewport
All interactive controls must meet minimum touch target of 44×44px
TopBar and NavigationTabs shared components must be included for consistent app chrome, matching patterns from dashboard and add-expense pages
Back/save navigation must return to dashboard per defined navigation trigger
Destructive or irreversible actions (e.g., reset preferences) must use coral-error (#F87171) accent with confirmation step
Disabled states must use opacity 0.38 on affected elements
referencePatterns: Settings drawer pattern from existing /settings screen adapted to full-page layout with TopBar and NavigationTabs chrome
Card-based section grouping pattern: each settings category (Profile, Preferences, Budget) wrapped in navy-surface card with medium border radius
Labeled input row pattern from Add Expense form: label above input, helper text below, focus ring using gold-amber border-focus token
Chip/pill selector pattern from PaymentMethodChipRow for preference toggles (e.g., currency, locale selection)
Full-width primary CTA button pattern from SaveExpenseButton for Save Settings action
Back arrow in TopBar navigation pattern consistent with Add Expense screen back navigation
Section divider using slate-border (#334155) horizontal rule between settings groups
BudgetSummaryCard inline edit pattern for default monthly budget field, referencing existing dashboard budget display
Toast notification pattern (z-index 1300) for confirming settings saved, consistent with currency-updated toast described in update-user-settings API
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for all body text: silver-text (#CBD5E1) on deep-navy (#0F172A) achieves approximately 10.9:1
WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for label text: silver-text (#CBD5E1) on navy-surface (#1E293B) achieves approximately 9.3:1
WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of at least 3:1 for large text and UI components: gold-amber (#F59E0B) on deep-navy (#0F172A) achieves approximately 8.5:1
All form inputs must have associated visible <label> elements or aria-label attributes; no placeholder-only labeling
Focus ring must be visible on all interactive elements using gold-amber (#F59E0B) outline, 2px width, 2px offset, matching state.focus_ring token
Keyboard navigation must be fully supported: Tab order follows logical top-to-bottom, left-to-right reading order through all settings fields
Save and Cancel/Back buttons must be reachable and activatable via keyboard (Enter/Space)
All toggle/switch controls must use role='switch' with aria-checked state announced to screen readers
Currency and locale selectors must use native <select> or ARIA combobox pattern with keyboard arrow-key navigation
Error states on invalid inputs must use aria-invalid='true' and aria-describedby pointing to inline error message in coral-error (#F87171)
Section headings must use semantic heading hierarchy (h1 for page title, h2 for section names) for screen reader landmark navigation
Success toast notification must be announced via aria-live='polite' region
Minimum touch target size of 44×44px enforced on all buttons, toggles, and interactive chips per design token touch_targets specification
Page must include a visible skip-to-main-content link for keyboard users bypassing TopBar navigation
dataModelDependencies: UserSettings entity (id, currency, default_monthly_budget, locale, created_at, updated_at) from user_settings domain — primary data model for this settings page
GET /api/settings endpoint to fetch current user settings on page load
PUT /api/settings endpoint to persist updated currency preference, default monthly budget, and locale on save
Budget entity (amount, currency, month, year) from budgets domain — referenced when displaying or editing default monthly budget context
Category entity from categories domain — may be referenced for default category preference display if profile preferences include spending category defaults
